## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking)

## Risk & destructive-change checklist

- [ ] This PR **deletes** files, data, or resources
- [ ] This PR changes **infrastructure / IaC** (`infra/`, Bicep, Terraform)
- [ ] This PR changes **CI/CD or security** workflows (`.github/`)
- [ ] This PR changes **dependencies** or lockfiles
- [ ] This PR touches **auth, secrets, or data handling**

> If any box above is checked, expect the human-in-the-loop approval gate.
